commands.name: ping
commands.helpText: Replies with pong, useful for testing if the connection works.

commands.name: help
commands.helpText: The text you are reading right now, displays information about commands.

arguments.name: command
arguments.helpText: The command to get help for, or "search" to search for commands

arguments.name: searchTerm
arguments.helpText: Search term to find commands (when first argument is "search")
